name: crawlingo
description: Crawlingo - next-generation web scraping and monitoring framework

scripts.prepack: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('src/native.js', 'dist/native.js'); fs.copyFileSync('src/native.d.ts', 'dist/native.d.ts'); fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f => f.endsWith('.node')).forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(f, 'dist/' + f)); fs.readdirSync('src').filter(f => f.endsWith('.node')).forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync('src/' + f, 'dist/' + f));"
